expected_facts: When neither Databricks model-serving system usage nor model_invocation_ledger is available, LLM usage instrumentation is missing.
The next action should tell the operator to enable system tables or add model_invocation_ledger.
The answer should distinguish model usage from budget usage.
guidelines: Do not report LLM usage as ready without a system usage source or BrickVision model ledger.

document.content: get_observability_overview sets llm_usage_instrumented from system model-serving usage or model_invocation_ledger.

expected_facts: Budget usage can be considered instrumented when both app and indexer budget ledgers exist, even if billing system tables are unavailable.
Budget namespaces separate app and indexer spend.
The response should point operators to review token usage by namespace when usage instrumentation is ready.
guidelines: Keep app and indexer budget namespaces separate in the evaluation.

document.content: budget_usage_instrumented is true when system billing is ready or both app and indexer ledgers exist.
